hero.title: Advisory Support & Transparency
hero.description: Ensuring every candidate has the data they need for a confident transition into their global professional journey.

questions.q: Is Sky States a legitimate US-registered company?
questions.a: Yes. Sky States operates as a legally compliant entity within the United States. We maintain active registration in Delaware and Wyoming, adhering to all federal and state-level regulatory standards for educational consulting and professional placement services.

We prioritize your identity protection. Sky States does not collect Social Security Numbers (SSNs) at any stage of the initial application or onboarding process. All financial transactions are handled through PCI-compliant, encrypted third-party gateways.
Average salary increase for transitioned candidates is 42% within 6 months of placement. Includes full access to Microsoft Professional Certification tracks valued at over $1,200.

questions.q: What is the refund initiation process?
questions.a: We offer a transparent, tiered refund policy: 3-Day 'No Questions' Window for full refund, 14-Day pro-rated window. Email support@skystates.com to initiate.
